title: Google Just Brought AI to Phones With 2GB of RAM
description: Google launched Gemini Go for Android Go devices with 2GB RAM — replacing Assistant Go with a conversational AI that handles calls, texts, location queries, and file uploads.

title: Mumbai Tech Week 2026 Concludes, Bringing Together 10,000+ Builders, Founders, and AI Leaders to Accelerate India’s AI Future
